# init(rawValue:)

**Initializer**

Creates a pixel buffer pool flush flags set with the options flags that you specify.

## Declaration

```swift
init(rawValue: CVOptionFlags)
```

## Parameters

- **rawValue**: The options flags.
title: init(rawValue:)
